race.comment: IMMEDIATE (5) is another winning chance for the Gollan yard. Just missed here first up and has raced in stronger since at Doomben. Went close there two back, and Ben Thompson stays aboard. Just needs average luck from an awkward barrier. LET'SFACETHEMUSIC (1) resumes and is right up to this if presented forward. Has switched from a top Victorian stable and is proven fresh. Has raced well in stronger than this. The niggle is an outside draw, but he has gate speed and should manage. Has prepared with a trial win here on the inner track. LUCKY LASS (8) also has claims for Gollan. Improved again at Beaudesert and has weight relief. The gate is tricky, but Jones is a key jockey engagement. LAKE NAGAMBIE (2) is a speedy improver drawn to advantage. Did a good job here 20 days ago in better class after a slow start. Lightly raced and has more to offer.
